title: zygophyllum scabrum
intro: Zygophyllum scabrum, also known as the desert ash or khorchik, is a shrub-like plant native to the deserts of Central Asia and parts of the Middle East. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Zygophyllum scabrum include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and branches are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
